title: Compare Faces v1 — Peer-to-Peer Compatibility Response
description: Contract for POST /compare/faces. Symmetric face-to-face comparison. No kinship assumptions. This is the canonical analysis endpoint for FamiliMatch (Solo, Duo, Group). All scoring is backend-authoritative — frontend MUST NOT re-derive percentage, chemistry_label, or feature_comparisons.

ok.description: Always true on success. Errors use HTTP 4xx/5xx instead.

percentage.description: Blended compatibility score as a percentage. Formula: round((0.6 * embedding_sim + 0.4 * feature_sim) * 100). Clamped to [0, 100].

chemistry_label.description: Human-readable compatibility tier. Derived from percentage: ≥85 Feature Twins, ≥70 Magnetic Match, ≥55 Complementary Pair, ≥40 Interesting Contrast, 0+ Opposites Attract.

chemistry_color.description: Hex colour paired with chemistry_label. Consistent with CHEMISTRY_LABELS in main.py.

embedding_similarity.description: Symmetric cosine similarity of face embeddings, normalised to [0,1] via (1 + cosine) / 2. Contributes 60% of the final score.

feature_similarity.description: Fraction of the 8 calibrated feature labels that match between face_a and face_b. Contributes 40% of the final score.

feature_comparisons.description: Exactly 8 feature comparisons, one per facial feature. Order matches _PEER_FEATURES: eyes, eyebrows, smile, nose, face_shape, skin, hair, ears.

shared_features.description: Feature keys where label_a == label_b (case-insensitive). Subset of the 8 feature keys.

calibrated_a.description: Full calibrated feature output for face_a from calibrate_all_features(). May be empty if calibration unavailable.

calibrated_b.description: Full calibrated feature output for face_b from calibrate_all_features(). May be empty if calibration unavailable.

name_a.description: Display name for face_a. Defaults to 'Person A' if not provided.

name_b.description: Display name for face_b. Defaults to 'Person B' if not provided.

featureKey.description: One of the 8 standardised facial feature keys.

label_a.description: Calibrated display label for face_a. 'Unknown' if calibration unavailable.

label_b.description: Calibrated display label for face_b. 'Unknown' if calibration unavailable.

match.description: True if label_a == label_b (case-insensitive) and both are non-empty non-Unknown values.

invariants: embedding_similarity and feature_similarity are floats in [0.0, 1.0]
shared_features is a subset of the 8 feature keys
chemistry_label is consistent with percentage thresholds
All inputs are from real face detection and embedding — no synthetic values
Symmetric: swapping face_a and face_b produces the same percentage
must_not: Frontend must NOT re-compute percentage from embedding/feature scores
Frontend must NOT call /kinship/analyze for FamiliMatch comparisons
Backend must NOT use parent/child framing for peer comparisons
No fabricated or placeholder values in any field
